[30;1m3170 | [0m[35m      // Byte encodings are:[0m

[30;1m3160 | [0m[35m    module.exports = {[0m
[30;1m3161 | [0m[35m      // == Japanese/ShiftJIS ====================================================[0m
[30;1m3162 | [0m[35m      // All japanese encodings are based on JIS X set of standards:[0m
[30;1m3163 | [0m[35m      // JIS X 0201 - Single-byte encoding of ASCII + ¥ + Kana chars at 0xA1-0xDF.[0m
[30;1m3164 | [0m[35m      // JIS X 0208 - Main set of 6879 characters, placed in 94x94 plane, to be encoded by 2 bytes. [0m
[30;1m3165 | [0m[35m      //              Has several variations in 1978, 1983, 1990 and 1997.[0m
[30;1m3166 | [0m[35m      // JIS X 0212 - Supplementary plane of 6067 chars in 94x94 plane. 1990. Effectively dead.[0m

[31m--[ [0m[34mMatch #[0m[33m617[0m[34m of [0m[33m1004[0m[31m ]--[0m

[30;1m143 | [0m[35m- **Key Rotation**: Support for credential rotation without service interruption[0m
[30;1m144 | [0m[35m[0m
